description_long: This is a round ceramic plate with a subtle, light blue decorative rim, holding a serving of food. The plate contains a leafy green salad, a portion of chickpeas or beans topped with a white sauce, and a baked or roasted main dish, possibly a roll or pastry with a golden-brown exterior. The food is arranged in three distinct sections, with the salad on one side, the beans in the middle, and the main dish occupying the remaining space. The plate itself has a slightly glossy finish and appears to be of medium thickness, typical of household dinnerware. There are no visible chips or cracks, and the food presentation suggests it is ready to be served or consumed.
description: A round ceramic plate with a light blue decorative rim, holding salad, beans with sauce, and a baked main dish. The plate is glossy and in good condition, with food neatly arranged in three sections.
description_view_0: The plate is seen with the salad on the left, beans and sauce in the center, and the baked main dish at the back right.
description_view_1: This view shows the salad on the left, beans in the foreground, and the baked main dish more prominently at the back.
description_view_2: The baked main dish is at the front, with the salad and beans receding to the back and left.
description_view_3: The plate is viewed from the side of the baked main dish, with the salad in the foreground and beans at the back.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: light blue decorative pattern visible on the rim
